scripts.deploy: npm --prefix client run build && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.test: bun test test/unit.test.ts test/worker.test.ts test/e2e.test.ts test/games.test.ts test/integration.test.ts
scripts.test:ui: bun test --timeout 15000 --max-concurrency 1 test/mobile.test.ts && bun test --timeout 15000 --max-concurrency 1 test/quad-view.test.ts && bun test --timeout 15000 --max-concurrency 1 test/demo-reel.test.ts && bun test --timeout 15000 --max-concurrency 1 test/full-tour.test.ts && bun test --timeout 15000 --max-concurrency 1 test/game-night.test.ts
